.github/workflows/assign-pr.yml.general_idea: Rename the GitHub Actions workflow for clarity.
Change the trigger event to pull_request_target to allow access to secrets and repository context.
Update the auto-assign-action version to a newer release.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Node.js related directories and files to the gitignore to prevent tracking build artifacts and dependencies.
Add Maven release plugin backup files to the gitignore to prevent tracking temporary release state files.
Refactor the node_modules ignore rule to be more specific and add package-lock.json to the ignore list.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 11; keeping version 1.8 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target environment or fail enforcer rules.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler flags with the unified release flag for JDK 9+ compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target flags are deprecated in JDK 9+ and removed in later versions; using them may cause warnings or errors depending on the JDK version used for building.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM arguments to export internal JDK compiler modules to the unnamed module for Error Prone compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: JDK 11 encapsulates internal APIs by default; Error Prone requires access to jdk.compiler internals, which will fail with InaccessibleObjectException without these exports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the javax.annotation-api dependency to replace the removed java.annotation module from the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The java.annotation module (containing @Nullable, @NonNull, etc.) was removed in JDK 11; code using these annotations will fail to compile without the external dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from the legacy plexus-compiler-javac-errorprone to the native Error Prone plugin integration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The plexus-compiler-javac-errorprone integration is outdated and may not support newer JDKs or Error Prone versions correctly; the native integration is required for modern builds.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Nexus Staging Plugin URL to the new s01 endpoint.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old oss.sonatype.org endpoint is deprecated/redirected; using the old URL may fail to deploy artifacts to the new Sonatype infrastructure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Change the project packaging from jar to pom to reflect its role as a parent BOM/configuration POM.
pom.xml.why_exists: A project with packaging 'jar' that contains no source code but only configuration should be 'pom' to avoid creating empty or misleading JAR artifacts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the artifact ID from codingstyle to codingstyle-pom to clarify its purpose.
Update the SCM connection URLs to match the new repository name.
Add the maven-enforcer-plugin to enforce the minimum Java version at build time.
Update various Maven plugin versions to their latest stable releases.
Update dependency versions for libraries like JUnit, Mockito, and ArchUnit.
Refactor JUnit dependencies to use the BOM for version management.
Add the maven-failsafe-plugin for integration testing.
Add the jacoco-maven-plugin configuration for code coverage.
Update the revapi plugin configuration to use the new JSON reporter and difference handling.
Add the assertj-assertions-generator-maven-plugin for generating assertion classes.
Update the distribution management URLs to the new Sonatype s01 endpoint.
